title: drosanthemum mathewsii
intro: Drosanthemum mathewsii, also known as the Mathews' daisy, is a species of flowering plant in the family Aizoaceae. This succulent plant is native to the Western Cape province in South Africa and is valued for its medicinal and health benefits. The plant has been traditionally used to treat various ailments, including fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, due to its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. Herbal preparations of Drosanthemum mathewsii can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures for medicinal use.
